zh.lifeSummary: 當Françoise Dite "de Heilly"   De Créquy於1256年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛時，她的父親Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier20歲，母親Aélis de Heilly19歲。她和Henri III De Preures至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1312年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯普勒斯享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dyte
meanings: English: nickname, perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English * dight, a side-form of Middle English dought ‘brave, valiant’, and possibly derived therefore from a shortened form of Old English dyhtig, dohtig ‘doughty’. Compare Doughty .

nameMeanings.name: "de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heilly"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of South German   Heinle  .

variants.name: Heinle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gunther, Konrad, Otto.
South German: from a pet form of the personal name   Heinrich  .

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Créquy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Françoise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Françoise Dite "de Heilly"   De Créquy was born in 1256, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier, was 20 and her mother, Aélis de Heilly, was 19. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Henri III De Preures. She died in 1312, in Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Françoise Dite "de Heilly"   De Créquy est née en 1256, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Aélis de Heilly, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Henri III De Preures. Elle est décédée en 1312, à Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Françoise Dite "de Heilly"   De Créquy 1256 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier 20 und ihre Mutter Aélis de Heilly 19. Sie hatte mit Henri III De Preures mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1312 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Françoise Dite "de Heilly"   De Créquy è nata il nel 1256 nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Aélis de Heilly, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Henri III De Preures. Morì nel 1312, nel Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Françoise Dite "de Heilly"   De Créquyが1256年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンで生まれた時，父Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalierは20歳，母Aélis de Heillyは19歳であった。彼女はHenri III De Preuresとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1312年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスプレウレスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Françoise Dite "de Heilly"   De Créquy(이)가 1256년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aélis de Heilly(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Henri III De Preures(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1312년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레우레스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Françoise Dite "de Heilly"   De Créquy nasceu em 1256, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Aélis de Heilly, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Henri III De Preures. Ela faleceu em 1312, em Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Françoise Dite "de Heilly"   De Créquy родилась в 1256 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Aélis de Heilly, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Henri III De Preures. Она умерла в 1312 г. в местности преуресь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Françoise Dite "de Heilly"   De Créquy nació en 1256, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Aélis de Heilly, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Henri III De Preures. Murió en 1312, en Preures, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
